summary: Update mode testing complete. Verified GM Screen enhancements: 12 tabs visible (Combat, Location, NPCs, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Dice, Party, Notes, Story Arcs, Soundboard, Uploads), 3D animated dice roller working via Quick Dice panel, new Story Arcs tab with arc creation, Soundboard tab with built-in sounds and upload option, Uploads tab with 5 upload categories, Live Session Mode panel accessible via floating button. All 9 new tests passed. Updated existing gm-quick-dice-panel.spec.ts to match new 3D dice roller behavior (was using toast notifications, now uses full-screen 3D animation).

12_tabs_visible.title: GM Screen loads with all 12 tabs visible
12_tabs_visible.details: All 12 tabs visible in sidebar: Combat, Location, NPCs, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Dice, Party, Notes, Story Arcs, Soundboard, Uploads
12_tabs_visible.evidence: Test 'GM Screen loads with all 12 tabs visible' passed

3d_dice_roller.title: 3D Dice roller triggers when clicking dice buttons
3d_dice_roller.details: Quick Dice panel on right side triggers full-screen 3D animated dice roller overlay when clicking d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20, Attack, Advantage, Damage, Fireball, or d100 buttons
3d_dice_roller.evidence: Tests 'Quick roll buttons trigger 3D dice animation' and '3D Dice roller triggers when clicking dice buttons' passed

soundboard_tab.title: Soundboard tab displays with built-in sound categories
soundboard_tab.details: Soundboard tab shows built-in sounds (Tavern, Forest, Campfire, etc.) with category filters (All, Nature, Locations, Weather, Action, Mood, Custom), master volume controls, and Upload Sound button
soundboard_tab.evidence: Test 'Soundboard tab displays with built-in sound categories' passed

story_arcs_tab.title: Story Arcs tab displays with ability to create new arcs
story_arcs_tab.details: Story Arcs tab shows 'Story Arcs & Quest Tracker' header with 'New Arc' button. Clicking New Arc opens form with title input, description, priority and status selectors
story_arcs_tab.evidence: Test 'Story Arcs tab displays with ability to create new arcs' passed

uploads_tab.title: Uploads tab displays with 5 upload categories
uploads_tab.details: Uploads tab shows 5 categories: Campaign Maps, Character Portraits, Documents & PDFs, Audio & Music, Other Files. Each has 'Click to Upload' button and Recent Uploads section
uploads_tab.evidence: Test 'Uploads tab displays with 5 upload categories' passed

all_tabs_render.title: All tabs render without errors
all_tabs_render.details: All 12 tabs (combat, location, npcs, monsters, tables, loot, dice, party, notes, story, sound, uploads) render their expected content without errors
all_tabs_render.evidence: Test 'All tabs render without errors' passed

live_session_mode.title: Live Session Mode panel accessible via floating button
live_session_mode.details: Lightning bolt button in bottom right corner opens Live Session panel with Quick Actions (d20, 2d6, Combat, NPC), Party info, Quick Note, and Quick Navigation
live_session_mode.evidence: Test 'Live Session Mode toggle button is visible' passed

test_results.backend: N/A - no backend changes in this update
